creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note sure if I misunderstand the question but: Yes, the port contains that new patch that you committed and my poudriere repo does contain that version of the port.

On my desktop I did successfully install octave-forge-control-4.0.0_1.
I did reboot, restart octave, reload the octave package and everything.

pkg info octave-forge-control-4.0.0_1
